channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-06-05
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: EU Steel Regulation: Commission launches consultation on the type of evidence to be provided on country of ‘melt and pour’
item.description: Today, the European Commission launched a targeted consultation seeking stakeholders’ feedback on the appropriate documentation for implementing the country ‘melt and pour’ traceability requirements under the EU Steel Regulation. — Thématique réglementation ; source jugée fiable (european commission - eu trade news) ; impact réglementaire.
